scripts.setup: bun install && ln -sf "$CONDUCTOR_ROOT_PATH/apps/cli/.env.development" apps/cli/.env.development && ln -sf "$CONDUCTOR_ROOT_PATH/apps/navigator/.env.development" apps/navigator/.env.development && ln -sf "$CONDUCTOR_ROOT_PATH/apps/healer/.env.development" apps/healer/.env.development && ln -sf "$CONDUCTOR_ROOT_PATH/packages/healing/.env.development" packages/healing/.env.development && ln -sf "$CONDUCTOR_ROOT_PATH/apps/api/.dev.vars" apps/api/.dev.vars
